description_long: This object is a pump-action shotgun featuring a long, cylindrical barrel with a ribbed pump handle beneath it. The stock is made of dark wood, smoothly contoured and extending into a full buttstock for shoulder support. The receiver and barrel are metallic, with a matte dark finish, and the pump grip is textured for secure handling. The trigger guard is rounded and proportionally sized, enclosing the trigger for safety. The muzzle is open and unadorned, with no visible choke or muzzle device. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for practical use in urban environments.
description: A pump-action shotgun with a dark wooden full stock, ribbed pump handle, and matte metal barrel and receiver.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the wooden stock, ribbed pump, and metallic barrel.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the narrow profile of the barrel and pump, with minimal detail visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the shotgun's full length, similar to view 0 but with the stock on the right.
description_view_3: Rear-on view showing the end of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel and pump.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long cylindrical barrel with ribbing beneath for the pump handle
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
